h1.visual_description: Inferred from footer; likely a large, bold section title at the beginning of chapters.

h2.visual_description: Bolded alphanumeric horizon label at the start of a paragraph, immediately followed by an em-dash and a depth range.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Soil horizon designation and its vertical depth interval in inches.
Munsell color system code (e.g., 10YR 4/2) providing a standardized description of soil color.
Structural delimiter used to separate different morphological properties (color, texture, structure, etc.) within a single horizon description.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text located at the bottom right, containing the section title and page number separated by a vertical bar (e.g., 'Soil Formation | 27').
